subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1915-01-29
subcodes.first_line: There are some souls who have not any tie, they are completely detached from all else save God. How wonderful is this station! There are also a number of individuals who are detached as far as themselves are concerned
subcodes.subjects: @the golden rule; regard for one's neighbor; doing unto others, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @compassion; kindness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
